hero.subtitle: n8n experts and fullstack engineers who turn complex business workflows into systems that run themselves.

caseStudies.sectionSubtitle: Real projects, real outcomes. A snapshot of what we've shipped.

items.tagline: One platform running ten aluminum factories that used to run on spreadsheets.
items.description: Kostika needed to stop managing each factory as a separate island. We built them one MES — order tracking, production planning, measurement workflows, Priority ERP integration — and rolled it across ten factories. They stopped reconciling spreadsheets.

items.tagline: Automation that has to hold under Black Friday load.
items.description: TerminalX's ops team was drowning in order, inventory, and customer comms workflows that didn't quite talk to each other. We slotted automation directly into their production infra — the kind that can't wobble when traffic spikes.

items.tagline: QC for precision sheet metal at a scale human inspection can't cover.
items.description: Sherman needed quality control that scaled past what human eyes could catch. We built the whole platform — CAD-vs-scan analysis, 3D bend inspection, live scanning sessions, automated reporting — with multi-LLM architecture (Claude / Gemini / GPT) so no single model outage stops the line.

scale.title: Built to carry weight.
scale.metricLabel: in operations flowing through systems 82Labs has built
scale.body: Manufacturing execution across multi-factory operations. Financial automation. Enterprise infrastructure. Defense-grade quality control. We build the systems teams depend on when the stakes are real.

items.quote: 82Labs built our entire operating platform — not an integration, not a feature, the whole system. It now runs across all our factories. Their ability to scope, architect, and ship at scale is rare.
items.author: Roee Malka

items.quote: They plugged into our enterprise stack without friction and shipped automation that holds up under real load. The level of ownership and technical rigor stood out immediately.
items.author: Avi Elkabetz

items.quote: Idan presented technology work at a level that made complex systems concrete and useful. The depth of technical understanding and the clarity of communication were exceptional.
items.author: א.

process.sectionSubtitle: A proven engagement model — no surprises, no scope creep.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We map your workflows, identify bottlenecks, and scope the smallest meaningful first release — usually 2-3 weeks.

build.title: Build
build.description: Weekly demos. Working software from day one. You see progress, we adjust course in real time — not after a 6-month black box.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: We hand off clean code, runbooks, and training. Your team owns what we built — we stay on call for what matters next.

services.sectionSubtitle: Three specialized domains where we deliver comprehensive solutions from concept to deployment.

fullstack.title: Fullstack Development
fullstack.description: Web and mobile apps built to scale. React, Node.js, Python, and modern cloud — shipped weekly, not quarterly.

automation.title: Workflow Automation
automation.description: Turn manual work into systems that run themselves. n8n workflows and LangGraph AI agents that plug into your existing stack.

lectures.title: Training & Workshops
lectures.description: Official n8n partners running hands-on workshops. Turn your team into automation experts in weeks, not years.

whyUs.sectionSubtitle: Numbers that speak for themselves — delivering results across industries and technologies.

fullstack.title: Fullstack Development

automation.intro: Complex workflow automation using n8n and LangGraph. AI-powered processes that integrate with your existing tools and systems.
automation.perfectFor: Businesses looking to streamline operations, reduce manual work, and implement intelligent decision-making processes.
